title: Keel Toys 14cm Keeleco Huggy Giraffe Ring Rattle
features: FEATURES: 100% Recycled with 6 unique characters, Keeleco Nursery brings together sustainability and engagement, in a truly adorable way!

ECO-FRIENDLY: these toys are manufactured and stuffed with rPET polyester made from 100% recycled plastic waste. Approximately 10 water bottles makes a 18cm toy, 14 bottles 25cm toy and 16 bottles a 30cm toy.
SUSTAINABLE: The Keeleco process gives plastic a second life and uses up to 59 percent less energy to produce than virgin polyester.
SAFETY: British safety standard BS EN 71 & European safety standard EN71 hand washable.
DESIGN: UK Design, Toy authenticated by the iconic Keel Toys FSC card disc
description: Product Description Keeleco Nursery is our premier recyclable nursery range. Featuring adorable and expressive characters; Huggy Zebra, Cozy Koala, Lullaby Lamb, Twinkle Unicorn, Marcel Monkey & Ezra Elephant. These characters come in a selection of stylish and engaging toys such; Ring Rattles, Stick Rattles, Comfy Blankets and Classic Plush Animals. This makes them the ideal gift for your children or loved ones. Safety Warning Remove all hangtags before giving to child.
